MergeMethodDocument.docs: Serde-deserializable mirror of domain::branch_strategy::MergeMethod for the metadata.json DTO layer. R9: finite set must be a typed enum, not String.

BranchStrategySnapshotDocument.docs: Serde DTO for the branch_strategy_snapshot sub-field of metadata.json. base_branch/merge_target are String (arbitrary branch names validated at domain conversion); merge_method is typed as MergeMethodDocument (R9 finite set).

JsonConfigBranchStrategyAdapter.docs: Reads branch strategy from .harness/config/branch-strategy.json. Implements BranchStrategyPort for the global-config resolution path (used at track init time before a snapshot exists).

SnapshotBranchStrategyAdapter.docs: Reads branch strategy from a captured BranchStrategySnapshot stored in metadata.json. Implements BranchStrategyPort for all post-init operations (CN-02: no re-read of global config).

BranchStrategyConfigError.docs: Error returned by JsonConfigBranchStrategyAdapter::new when the branch-strategy config file cannot be read (Io) or cannot be parsed as valid JSON (Parse). Fail-closed per D5: no fallback, no grace period.

TrackDocumentV2.docs: Identity-only DTO for metadata.json. branch_strategy_snapshot is declared as BranchStrategySnapshotDocument (non-optional, no #[serde(default)]): serde returns a missing-field error when the key is absent from JSON, enforcing fail-closed parse behavior per CN-03.

FsReviewGateStateAdapter.docs: Filesystem-backed adapter implementing usecase::fixpoint_resolve::ReviewGateStatePort. This track adds a base_branch field: the .commit_hash-miss fallback now runs `git rev-parse <base_branch>` via argv-style git invocation instead of the previous hardcoded 'main' literal (D1/IN-04, AC-04 command-boundary safety).

FsDiffBaseResolverAdapter.docs: Filesystem adapter implementing usecase::fixpoint_resolve::DiffBaseResolverPort. Owns the configured base_branch (read from the active track's branch_strategy_snapshot) and falls back to `git rev-parse <base_branch>` (argv-style, AC-04 command-boundary safety) when .commit_hash is absent, non-ancestor, or unreadable (D1/IN-04).

FsDryApprovalFactoryAdapter.docs: Relocated from apps/cli-composition/src/track/fixpoint_resolve.rs (IN-11 / ADR 1328 D7: port-impl adapters belong in libs/infrastructure). Implements usecase::fixpoint_resolve::DryApprovalFactoryPort by constructing a DryCheckApprovalInteractor from the injected dry-check config and resolved corpus metadata. Zero-field unit struct, constructed by name (no constructor function), matching FsDryCorpusMetaAdapter's existing sibling pattern in this module family.

FsFixpointWorkspaceContextAdapter.docs: Implements usecase::fixpoint_resolve_driver::FixpointWorkspaceContextPort (IN-12/AC-17, corrects the 2026-07-02 plan-artifacts final-review P1 finding: this adapter performs only the workspace-path-resolution I/O concern -- it does not invoke FixpointResolveService or perform gate orchestration, which now live in usecase::fixpoint_resolve_driver::FixpointResolveDriverInteractor per ADR 1328 D4). Reproduces the CWD-anchored repo discovery, items_dir canonicalization/containment validation, and project-root derivation previously inline in the removed `TrackCompositionRoot::fixpoint_resolve`, and reads metadata.json's branch_strategy_snapshot.base_branch via infrastructure::track::codec::decode. Fail-closed per CN-03/CN-06: unlike the removed inline code's temporary "main" fallback used only when metadata.json was absent, this adapter maps a missing metadata.json (and any other I/O/decode error) to FixpointWorkspaceContextError::Unavailable, with no branch-name fallback. Zero-field unit struct, constructed by name (no constructor function), matching FsDryApprovalFactoryAdapter's sibling pattern.

FsDryCheckConfigLoaderAdapter.docs: Implements usecase::fixpoint_resolve_driver::DryCheckConfigLoaderPort (IN-12/AC-17). Wraps the existing infrastructure::dry_check::DryCheckConfig::load(...) file read plus the existing infra-DTO-to-usecase-config conversion, previously called inline (via crate::dry::build_usecase_dry_check_config_pub) from the removed `TrackCompositionRoot::fixpoint_resolve`. Zero-field unit struct, constructed by name (no constructor function), matching FsDryApprovalFactoryAdapter's sibling pattern.

FsFixpointDryGateFactoryAdapter.docs: Implements usecase::fixpoint_resolve_driver::FixpointDryGateFactoryPort (IN-12/AC-17). Reproduces the wiring previously done by the removed `TrackCompositionRoot::make_dry_gate_interactor` helper: constructs `usecase::fixpoint_resolve::FixpointDryGateInteractor` from `infrastructure::dry_check::noop_approval::NoOpDryApprovalService`, `infrastructure::dry_check::diff_base_resolver::FsDiffBaseResolverAdapter::new(base_branch)`, `infrastructure::dry_check::FsDryCorpusMetaAdapter`, a `usecase::dry_check::DryFragmentPipelineInteractor` wired with `infrastructure::dry_check::GitDryCheckDiffGetter` + `infrastructure::semantic_dup::CodeFragmentExtractorAdapter`, and `infrastructure::dry_check::approval_factory::FsDryApprovalFactoryAdapter`. Returns it as `Arc<dyn usecase::fixpoint_resolve::FixpointDryGateService>`. Zero-field unit struct, constructed by name (no constructor function), matching FsDryApprovalFactoryAdapter's sibling pattern.

FsFixpointGateStateFactoryAdapter.docs: Implements usecase::fixpoint_resolve_driver::FixpointGateStateFactoryPort (IN-12/AC-17). `build_review_gate` constructs `infrastructure::track::gate_state::FsReviewGateStateAdapter::new(items_dir, base_branch)`; `build_ref_verify_gate` constructs `infrastructure::track::gate_state::FsRefVerifyGateStateAdapter::new(items_dir)`. Both were previously constructed inline in the removed `TrackCompositionRoot::fixpoint_resolve`. Zero-field unit struct, constructed by name (no constructor function), matching FsDryApprovalFactoryAdapter's sibling pattern.

methods.name: new
methods.docs: Create an adapter that reads and parses the branch strategy from the given JSON config file path. Returns Err if the file cannot be read or parsed.

methods.name: new
methods.docs: Create an adapter backed by a captured BranchStrategySnapshot.

methods.name: new
methods.docs: Creates a new adapter anchored to items_dir (the track/items directory) with the configured base_branch used for .commit_hash-miss fallback resolution.

methods.name: new
methods.docs: Construct with the configured base branch.
